unbound.description: No target. Units exist in ConfigHub only.

noop.description: Noop targets. Apply workflow works, but no real cluster delivery.

real.description: Real Kubernetes targets. Apply delivers to live cluster.

mutation_outcomes.name: apply-here
mutation_outcomes.description: Direct mutation in ConfigHub. Change survives refreshes.

mutation_outcomes.name: lift-upstream
mutation_outcomes.description: Route change back to app source. Bundle exists; automated PR creation is not implemented yet.

mutation_outcomes.name: block-escalate
mutation_outcomes.description: Block or escalate. Platform-owned field requires approval.
